violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving of the dairy section in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

An accumulation of bags and boxes were observed overflowing the dumpster in the refuse area outside of the dumpster. Refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be stored in receptacles or waste handling units so that they are inaccessible to insects and rodents. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

The Floor in the walk-in cooler under the milk area has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023
